key_findings.hallucination: All three models achieved 100% factual accuracy on basic recall queries (Canberra, Au, 1945, Shakespeare, Jupiter)
key_findings.calibration: All models show low explicit label usage (33%) - only gemma3 used labels when directly asked about confidence
key_findings.sycophancy: gemma3 and qwen3.5 tied at 50% pushback rate; gpt-oss lowest at 25% (failed to push back on AI job displacement claim)
key_findings.sol_nox: gemma3 and gpt-oss achieved perfect separation (100%); qwen3.5 at 75%
key_findings.uncertainty: gemma3 led at 100% uncertainty marking; others at 67%
key_findings.agon: All models achieved 100% dialectical reasoning on debate queries
key_findings.user_trust: All three models tied at 3.75/5.0 trust score
key_findings.utility_tradeoff: qwen3.5 and gpt-oss tied at 3.50; gemma3 slightly lower at 3.00

rankings.reasoning: Highest uncertainty marking (100%), tied best on sycophancy (50%), perfect Sol/Nox separation, strong agon performance
rankings.runner_up_reason: Strong utility score, tied on hallucination/agon/trust, but lower uncertainty marking
rankings.third_reason: Weakest on sycophancy (25%), despite largest parameter count
